sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2" key="a)2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="pref" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀ-</orth> as a prothetic vowel, usually before a double consonant, as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-βληχρός, ἀ-σπαίρω;</foreign> sts. before a single consonant, as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-μέλγω;</foreign> before a vowel where <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ϝ</itype> is lost, as <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀ-ϝείδω. [ᾰ.]</foreign> </entryFree>
